title: Frontier Board
description: Top-level array of frontier-model rows (content/frontier_board.json), spec sec-5 verbatim: [{lab, region, model, release_date, modality[], context_window?, access, significance, source_url, last_verified}]. Phase 1 ships this schema only -- seeding >=12 rows across US/China/open-weights is Phase 3. Phase 6 adds a required company_id FK into the new content/companies/<id>.json registry (schemas/company.schema.json) -- see that field's own description, and region's rewritten one, for the geography-authority split this introduces.

region.description: An editorial lane for Board-page grouping ONLY (which section of the Board this row is displayed under) -- it is never a geography source. Actual HQ geography (country/city/lat/lng) lives on the company registry, resolved via company_id (schemas/company.schema.json). This distinction matters concretely for e.g. a US-HQ'd lab that primarily ships open-weights models: region here reflects the Board's editorial grouping choice for that row, while company_id's hq_country is the fact-checked geography.

company_id.description: Foreign key into content/companies/<id>.json (schemas/company.schema.json's id field) -- the lab this model row belongs to. This is the authoritative link to that company's HQ geography, official domains, and full profile; region above is a separate, editorial-only field and must not be read as a geography source.

modality.description: Free-form modality tags, e.g. 'text', 'image', 'audio', 'code'. Spec does not fix an enum here.

context_window.description: Context window in tokens, nullable when not publicly disclosed.

last_verified.description: Date this row was last fact-checked against its source_url. Frontend pulse-eligibility (last 7 days) is computed from this field.
